title: bauhinia subrotundifolia
intro: Bauhinia subrotundifolia, also known as the small-leaved bauhinia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the bauhinia genus. It is a tropical plant native to Asia and is often used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Bauhinia subrotundifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
